templates.name: GitHub Directory Download
templates.description: Adds a download button to GitHub directory views, allowing you to download individual directories as ZIP files without cloning the entire repository. Uses the GitHub API to fetch directory contents and an inline ZIP builder to package them.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: GitHub Directory Download
scripts.description: Injects a download button into GitHub directory listings. Fetches directory contents via the GitHub API and packages them into a ZIP file using an inline ZIP builder.
